name.en-US: Commentary on the De Sensu et Sensato
name.la: Sententia super De Sensu et Sensato

description.en-US: Aquinas's commentary on Aristotle's *De Sensu et Sensato* — on the external senses and their objects, complementing the *De Anima* commentary.
description.la: Expositio *De Sensu et Sensato* Aristotelis — de sensibus exterioribus eorumque obiectis, ad commentarium *De Anima* pertinens.

sources.description: English translation by Edward M. Macierowski. Mirrored via the Geremia/AquinasOperaOmnia GitHub repository.
Latin Leonine / Marietti edition (public domain), mirrored from dhspriory.org via the Geremia/AquinasOperaOmnia GitHub repository.
